zh.siteSubtitle: 东正教圣山修士预言（约1900年至今）
zh.homeIntro1: 阿陀斯山（Mount Athos）是位于希腊北部的自治修道共和国，被东正教信徒尊为「圣山」。自公元963年建立第一座修道院以来，圣山上延续着超过千年的修道传统，至今仍有约2000名修士在20座修道院中生活、祈祷。
zh.homeIntro2: 20世纪以来，圣山涌现出多位被信众尊为「长老」（希腊语 Gerontas，俄语 Starets）的灵性导师，其中最著名的包括帕伊西奥斯长老（Elder Paisios, 1924-1994）、静修者约瑟夫长老（Joseph the Hesychast, 1897-1959）、波菲里奥斯长老（Elder Porphyrios, 1906-1991）等。他们在灵修生活中留下了大量关于未来的预言。
zh.homeIntro3: 这些预言集中在几个主题上：土耳其的命运与君士坦丁堡的回归、俄土之间的战争、敌基督的出现、第三次世界大战，以及东正教信仰的最终胜利。本站整理了多位圣山长老的预言，并对已到期的预言进行了真实度评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「君士坦丁堡终将回到我们手中。土耳其将灭亡——这是确定无疑的。战争将从土耳其和俄罗斯之间开始。」——帕伊西奥斯长老
keyPointsList: 1897-1959 —— 静修者约瑟夫长老在圣山隐修，留下灵性教导与末世预言
1906-1991 —— 波菲里奥斯长老在圣山修行，以灵视能力闻名
1924-1994 —— 帕伊西奥斯长老在圣山隐修，预言土耳其覆灭与君士坦丁堡回归
1992 —— 帕伊西奥斯长老公开谈论土耳其与希腊的未来冲突
2015 —— 帕伊西奥斯长老被东正教会封为圣人
sourceList: 帕伊西奥斯长老预言主要来自其口述记录与传记，由弟子整理出版（Wikipedia: Paisios）
静修者约瑟夫长老资料来自其灵性书信与传记（Wikipedia: Joseph the Hesychast）
波菲里奥斯长老资料来自传记《受伤的牧者》（Wikipedia: Porphyrios）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和历史文献
编者观点不代表学术定论，也不代表东正教会官方立场
站点图标采用东正教三横十字架——这是东正教最核心的信仰符号，也是阿陀斯圣山修道院最常见的标志

en.siteSubtitle: Orthodox Prophecies from the Holy Mountain (c. 1900-present)
en.homeIntro1: Mount Athos is an autonomous monastic republic in northern Greece, revered by Orthodox Christians as the 'Holy Mountain'. Since the founding of the first monastery in 963 AD, over a millennium of monastic tradition has been maintained here, with approximately 2,000 monks currently living and praying in 20 monasteries.
en.homeIntro2: Since the 20th century, the Holy Mountain has produced several spiritual masters known as 'Elders' (Greek: Gerontas, Russian: Starets). The most renowned include Elder Paisios (1924-1994), Joseph the Hesychast (1897-1959), and Elder Porphyrios (1906-1991). Through their lives of prayer and asceticism, they left behind numerous prophecies about the future.
en.homeIntro3: These prophecies center on several themes: the fate of Turkey and the return of Constantinople, war between Russia and Turkey, the appearance of the Antichrist, World War III, and the ultimate triumph of the Orthodox faith. This site compiles prophecies from multiple Holy Mountain elders and evaluates those whose predicted timeframes have passed.
en.coreQuote: "Constantinople will be ours again. Turkey will be destroyed — this is certain. The war will start between Russia and Turkey." — Elder Paisios
keyPointsList: 1897-1959 —— Joseph the Hesychast lived as a hermit on Mount Athos, leaving spiritual teachings and eschatological prophecies
1906-1991 —— Elder Porphyrios practiced on Mount Athos, renowned for his gift of spiritual sight
1924-1994 —— Elder Paisios lived on Mount Athos, prophesying the fall of Turkey and return of Constantinople
1992 —— Elder Paisios publicly discussed future conflict between Turkey and Greece
2015 —— Elder Paisios canonized as a saint by the Orthodox Church
sourceList: Elder Paisios' prophecies primarily from oral accounts and biographies compiled by his disciples (Wikipedia: Paisios)
Joseph the Hesychast's material from his spiritual letters and biography (Wikipedia: Joseph the Hesychast)
Elder Porphyrios' material from the biography 'Wounded by Love' (Wikipedia: Porphyrios)
Verification based on public news reports and historical records
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus or official positions of the Orthodox Church
Site icon: Orthodox three-bar cross — the central symbol of Orthodox Christianity and the most common emblem of Mount Athos monasteries
